format: ALEX/JORDAN dialogue, plain text, no stage directions
notes: Episode 1 covers birth (Trenton, NJ; adopted from convent), upbringing (Southern NJ), Penn 1996 (English major / theater minor / Glee Club), Maryland Law 2000 (Law Review / Moot Court / Mock Trial / Health Law), Battaglia clerkship 2000-01, family (Eric Luedtke + 4 kids in Ashton). Five gaps named on-air: birth year, high school, Penn-to-law-school gap, private-practice firm, pre-25 public statements. Hits the dossier's open questions explicitly rather than inventing.
